'''thapacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackeroons|smackeroons]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackeroons|smackeroons]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thapacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæpæchæth|thæpæchæth]] || [[word:thæpæchæj|thæpæchæj]] || [[word:thæpæchæsh|thæpæchæsh]] || [[word:thæpæchæ|thæpæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thapapachath|thapapachath]] || [[word:thapapachaj|thapapachaj]] || [[word:thapapachash|thapapachash]] || [[word:thapapacha|thapapacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapachath|thapachath]] || [[word:thapachaj|thapachaj]] || [[word:thapachash|thapachash]] || [[word:thapacha|thapacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapafchath|thapafchath]] || [[word:thapafchaj|thapafchaj]] || [[word:thapafchash|thapafchash]] || [[word:thapafchaf|thapafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thapachatha|thapachatha]] || [[word:thapachaja|thapachaja]] || [[word:thapachasha|thapachasha]] || [[word:thapachaka|thapachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thapachath|thapachath]] || [[word:thapachaj|thapachaj]] || [[word:thapachash|thapachash]] || [[word:thapacha|thapacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thapachathal|thapachathal]] || [[word:thapachajal|thapachajal]] || [[word:thapachashal|thapachashal]] || [[word:thapachakal|thapachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thapachathatha|thapachathatha]] || [[word:thapachajaja|thapachajaja]] || [[word:thapachashasha|thapachashasha]] || [[word:thapachaka|thapachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thapachathan|thapachathan]] || [[word:thapachajan|thapachajan]] || [[word:thapachashan|thapachashan]] || [[word:thapachakan|thapachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thapachathaoro|thapachathaoro]] || [[word:thapachajaoro|thapachajaoro]] || [[word:thapachashaoro|thapachashaoro]] || [[word:thapachakaoro|thapachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
